prompt: Which professors give the lowest average grades (strictest graders)?

inputData.question: Which professors give the lowest average grades (strictest graders)?

response.bodyRaw:
{"status":"success","steps":{"input":{"question":"Which professors give the lowest average grades (strictest graders)?"},"sql":{"payload":{"question":"Which professors give the lowest average grades (strictest graders)?"},"startedAt":1771855997023,"status":"success","output":{"reasoning":"The user wants to identify professors who give the lowest average grades (strictest graders). I've confirmed the schema structure: professors are linked to course_sections, which have enrollments, which have grades. The grades table contains exam_score, project_score, and attendance_score. To find the strictest graders, I'll calculate the average of all grade components (exam, project, attendance) for each professor and order by lowest average. This gives a comprehensive view of grading strictness across all assessment types.","sql":"
SELECT 
  p.id,
  p.first_name,
  p.last_name,
  COUNT(DISTINCT g.id) as total_grades,
  ROUND(AVG(g.exam_score)::numeric, 2) as avg_exam_score,
  ROUND(AVG(g.project_score)::numeric, 2) as avg_project_score,
  ROUND(AVG(g.attendance_score)::numeric, 2) as avg_attendance_score,
  ROUND(AVG((COALESCE(g.exam_score, 0) + COALESCE(g.project_score, 0) + COALESCE(g.attendance_score, 0)) / 3)::numeric, 2) as avg_overall_grade
FROM professors p
JOIN course_sections cs ON p.id = cs.professor_id
JOIN enrollments e ON cs.id = e.course_section_id
JOIN grades g ON e.id = g.enrollment_id
GROUP BY p.id, p.first_name, p.last_name
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT g.id) > 0
ORDER BY avg_overall_grade ASC
","assumptions":["Strictest graders are identified by lowest average grades across exam, project, and attendance scores","Only professors with at least one grade record are included","Average overall grade is calculated as the mean of exam, project, and attendance scores","NULL scores are treated as 0 in the overall calculation"]},"endedAt":1771856040097},"run-raw-sql":{"payload":{"sql":"
SELECT 
  p.id,
  p.first_name,
  p.last_name,
  COUNT(DISTINCT g.id) as total_grades,
  ROUND(AVG(g.exam_score)::numeric, 2) as avg_exam_score,
  ROUND(AVG(g.project_score)::numeric, 2) as avg_project_score,
  ROUND(AVG(g.attendance_score)::numeric, 2) as avg_attendance_score,
  ROUND(AVG((COALESCE(g.exam_score, 0) + COALESCE(g.project_score, 0) + COALESCE(g.attendance_score, 0)) / 3)::numeric, 2) as avg_overall_grade
FROM professors p
JOIN course_sections cs ON p.id = cs.professor_id
JOIN enrollments e ON cs.id = e.course_section_id
JOIN grades g ON e.id = g.enrollment_id
GROUP BY p.id, p.first_name, p.last_name
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT g.id) > 0
ORDER BY avg_overall_grade ASC
"},"startedAt":1771856040110,"status":"success","output":{"ok":true,"sql":"SELECT

FROM professors p

The chart directly answers the question by showing which professors give the lowest average grades."},"startedAt":1771856044949,"status":"success","output":{"sql":"
SELECT 
  p.id,
  p.first_name,
  p.last_name,
  COUNT(DISTINCT g.id) as total_grades,
  ROUND(AVG(g.exam_score)::numeric, 2) as avg_exam_score,
  ROUND(AVG(g.project_score)::numeric, 2) as avg_project_score,
  ROUND(AVG(g.attendance_score)::numeric, 2) as avg_attendance_score,
  ROUND(AVG((COALESCE(g.exam_score, 0) + COALESCE(g.project_score, 0) + COALESCE(g.attendance_score, 0)) / 3)::numeric, 2) as avg_overall_grade
FROM professors p
JOIN course_sections cs ON p.id = cs.professor_id
JOIN enrollments e ON cs.id = e.course_section_id
JOIN grades g ON e.id = g.enrollment_id
GROUP BY p.id, p.first_name, p.last_name
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT g.id) > 0
ORDER BY avg_overall_grade ASC

professors give the lowest average grades (strictest graders)?"},"result":{"sql":"
SELECT 
  p.id,
  p.first_name,
  p.last_name,
  COUNT(DISTINCT g.id) as total_grades,
  ROUND(AVG(g.exam_score)::numeric, 2) as avg_exam_score,
  ROUND(AVG(g.project_score)::numeric, 2) as avg_project_score,
  ROUND(AVG(g.attendance_score)::numeric, 2) as avg_attendance_score,
  ROUND(AVG((COALESCE(g.exam_score, 0) + COALESCE(g.project_score, 0) + COALESCE(g.attendance_score, 0)) / 3)::numeric, 2) as avg_overall_grade
FROM professors p
JOIN course_sections cs ON p.id = cs.professor_id
JOIN enrollments e ON cs.id = e.course_section_id
JOIN grades g ON e.id = g.enrollment_id
GROUP BY p.id, p.first_name, p.last_name
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT g.id) > 0
ORDER BY avg_overall_grade ASC

visualization.title: Professors Ranked by Average Overall Grade (Strictest Graders First)

resultRaw.sql:
SELECT 
  p.id,
  p.first_name,
  p.last_name,
  COUNT(DISTINCT g.id) as total_grades,
  ROUND(AVG(g.exam_score)::numeric, 2) as avg_exam_score,
  ROUND(AVG(g.project_score)::numeric, 2) as avg_project_score,
  ROUND(AVG(g.attendance_score)::numeric, 2) as avg_attendance_score,
  ROUND(AVG((COALESCE(g.exam_score, 0) + COALESCE(g.project_score, 0) + COALESCE(g.attendance_score, 0)) / 3)::numeric, 2) as avg_overall_grade
FROM professors p
JOIN course_sections cs ON p.id = cs.professor_id
JOIN enrollments e ON cs.id = e.course_section_id
JOIN grades g ON e.id = g.enrollment_id
GROUP BY p.id, p.first_name, p.last_name
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT g.id) > 0
ORDER BY avg_overall_grade ASC

visualization.title: Professors Ranked by Average Overall Grade (Strictest Graders First)

result.sql:
SELECT 
  p.id,
  p.first_name,
  p.last_name,
  COUNT(DISTINCT g.id) as total_grades,
  ROUND(AVG(g.exam_score)::numeric, 2) as avg_exam_score,
  ROUND(AVG(g.project_score)::numeric, 2) as avg_project_score,
  ROUND(AVG(g.attendance_score)::numeric, 2) as avg_attendance_score,
  ROUND(AVG((COALESCE(g.exam_score, 0) + COALESCE(g.project_score, 0) + COALESCE(g.attendance_score, 0)) / 3)::numeric, 2) as avg_overall_grade
FROM professors p
JOIN course_sections cs ON p.id = cs.professor_id
JOIN enrollments e ON cs.id = e.course_section_id
JOIN grades g ON e.id = g.enrollment_id
GROUP BY p.id, p.first_name, p.last_name
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT g.id) > 0
ORDER BY avg_overall_grade ASC
